title: centaurea × porcii
intro: Centaurea × porcii, also known as Porcii cornflower or Centaurea porcii, is a hybrid ornamental plant in the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × porcii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to gastrointestinal problems.
